easy.title: Style Your First HTML Page
easy.description: Create an HTML page about your favorite hobby. Use an external CSS file to style it with a custom background color, heading color, and font family.
easy.starterCode:
My Hobby

I enjoy doing this in my free time.
easy.solution:
My Photography Journey

I love capturing moments with my camera. Photography allows me to express creativity and freeze time.

/* style.css */ body { background-color: #f0f8ff; font-family: 'Georgia', serif; margin: 40px; } h1 { color: #2c3e50; text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid #3498db; padding-bottom: 10px; } p { font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; line-height: 1.8; color: #34495e; }

medium.title: Fix the Specificity Conflict
medium.description: Given the HTML and CSS below, the paragraph should be blue. Fix the CSS specificity issue so the paragraph appears blue without changing the HTML.
medium.starterCode: This text should be blue
medium.solution: This text should be blue

hard.title: Build a Multi-Page Style System
hard.description: Create a mini-website with 3 HTML pages (index.html, about.html, contact.html) that all share one common external stylesheet. Each page should have consistent branding but a unique accent color per page using body classes.
hard.starterCode:
Home About Contact

Welcome

Home page content.
